concerns.text: Success Criterion SC‑005 (parsing‑error rate ≤ 5 %) is not linked to any task or test. No task verifies that logged parsing errors stay below the 5 % threshold.

Success Criterion SC‑015 (sensitivity‑analysis variation < 0.02) has no associated task. The plan includes binomial testing (FR‑005a) but lacks a task that measures or asserts the maximum variation across baseline proportions.

Success Criterion SC‑027 (no domain > 30 % and bias‑adjusted rate reporting) is not covered by a dedicated verification task. While T033 implements bias‑adjustment (FR‑027), there is no task that checks the domain‑proportion constraint or validates the bias‑adjusted rate output.

Success Criterion SC‑028 (Quickstart guide enables audit of 30 URLs in ≤ 30 minutes) is only referenced by T037 (guide creation). No task measures or tests the execution time to ensure the 30‑minute bound is met.
